subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One of the world, Who hath manifested unto the righteous that which lay concealed within hearts and minds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را که آنچه را که در افئده و قلوب مستور بود ظاهر فرمود ابرار را
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
